title: Objects, Scope, Linkage, Storage Duration, and Lifetime · C Contract Brief: Scope Linkage Duration
summary: An embedded controller caches addresses across callbacks while automatic, static, thread, and allocated objects begin and end at different times. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem scope linkage duration increment in object lifetime and address ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map scope, linkage, and storage duration independently for block, file, static, thread, and allocated objects.
Distinguish an object, its value, representation bytes, address, declared type, and current lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
